messages.text: Hey guys, I'm thinking we should plan a trip somewhere warm next month!
Yesss I'm so down. Somewhere beachy? I need to escape this cold.
I'm in! But let's keep it under $1500 per person max.
Totally fair. Maybe somewhere in Mexico or the Caribbean?
Cancun vibes? I've always wanted to go. March 15-22 works for me.
Same dates work. Let's find a nice resort with a pool and beach access.
Okay team trip planning time. I want mountains and adventure.
Ooh how about Switzerland? Zermatt is insane for hiking.
Love that. Budget-wise I can do up to $3000 for flights and hotel combined.
I'm looking at June dates, maybe June 10-18?
Perfect, let's find something with mountain views and maybe a spa.
Yes spa is a must. And good hiking access.
So for the bachelorette party... I'm thinking a fun city trip!
OMG yes. Tokyo?? Or maybe Barcelona??
Barcelona sounds amazing. Great food, nightlife, culture.
What's the budget looking like? I can swing about $2000 total.
Same here. Let's aim for April, maybe April 5-12.
Perfect. We need a hotel in a central location with good restaurants nearby.
Family reunion trip this summer. Need somewhere everyone will enjoy.
How about somewhere cultural? Kyoto was on my bucket list.
That's a great idea. Budget is flexible, maybe $4000 per person since it's a big trip.
July 20 to August 2? That's when the kids are off school.
Works for me. Let's find family-friendly hotels with breakfast included.
And somewhere that's walkable to temples and markets.
Budget backpacking trip anyone? I want adventure on a shoestring.
I'm in. Costa Rica? Volcanos, rainforest, surfing.
Yes! I can only spend like $800 total though.
We can make it work with hostels. May sometime?
May 1-10 works for me. Let's do it.
Adventure vibe all the way. Don't need anything fancy, just a clean place to sleep.
